visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
- Application form duly filled and signed by the applicant.
- Two recent passport size colour photograph (not older than 6 months).
- Photocopies of:
- Passport
- Applicants Oman Visa
- Previous Schengen, USA, UK, Canada, Japan visas
- Passport not older than 10 years
- Passport’s validity minimum 90 days from the date of expiry of the requested visa
- Two blank opposite pages
- Oman Visa valid for at least 90 days from the date of expiry of the requested visa
- Covering letter for the applicant detailing purpose of trip, duration of stay and outlining travel itinerary.
- Local sponsor’s letter( N.O.C)* Form B specifying salary

*If the applicant is a partner of the local company, he has to provide Trade license and sponsor Letter
- Proof of Financial means:
- Bank Statements of the last 3 months.(Original or copy stamped by the bank).
- Pay Slips of the last 3 months
- Return air ticket reservation.
- Confirmed hotel booking or Letter of invitation of the Austrian host
- Medical Travel Insurance
- Minimum coverage of Euro 30,000
- Inclusive of repatriation flight
- For Minors:
- Signature of both the parents is required in the Visa application form.
- Birth certificate with the parents name, parents passport copy and Air ticket.
- If the Minor is travelling unaccompanied affidavit signed by both parents and their passport copy.
- Both parents have to be present at the time of application submission.

- Please click here to download minor form
- All applicants are requested to please print the below documents
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for OMANI 11 2025 
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for NON-OMANI 12 2024
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for Yemeni Citizens 12 2024
- Information Data Protection
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Tourism]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Omani Riyals is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of OMR 13.500 per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is
                                                                        10 working days (starting from the time when the
                                                                        Embassy or Consulate received the application,
                                                                        not including the transportation time), counting
                                                                        from when all requested documents have been
                                                                        submitted. This period may be extended in
                                                                        specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of
                                                                        the application is required, for example, when
                                                                        an applicant must come to an interview or submit
                                                                        additional documentation requested by the
                                                                        Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of
                                                                        the year, the processing time can be longer due
                                                                        to the high volume of applications. It is
                                                                        recommended to submit your visa application at
                                                                        least two weeks prior to date of travel date and
                                                                        if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday
                                                                        period. 
Please note that the application processing time
                                                                        and decisions on visa applications are the sole
                                                                        prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS
                                                                        Global has no role to play in these areas of the
                                                                        application process.

Visa Application Form - English
visa_types.overview:
Overview
The applicant will have to provide evidence that
                                                                        he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer
                                                                        to the documents required page to make sure that
                                                                        you have all the supporting documents.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The applicant will have to provide evidence that
                                                                        he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer
                                                                        to the documents required page to make sure that
                                                                        you have all the supporting documents.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourism]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Omani Riyals is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of OMR 13.500 per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- Application form duly filled and signed by the applicant.
- Two recent passport size colour photograph (not older than 6 months).
- Photocopies of:
- Passport
- Applicants Oman Visa
- Previous Schengen, USA, UK, Canada, Japan visas
- Passport not older than 10 years
- Passport’s validity minimum 90 days from the date of expiry of the requested visa
- Two blank opposite pages
- Oman Visa valid for at least 90 days from the date of expiry of the requested visa
- Covering letter for the applicant detailing purpose of trip, duration of stay and outlining travel itinerary.
- Local sponsor’s letter( N.O.C)* Form B specifying salary

*If the applicant is a partner of the local company, he has to provide Trade license and sponsor Letter
- Proof of Financial means:
- Bank Statements of the last 3 months.(Original or copy stamped by the bank).
- Pay Slips of the last 3 months
- Return air ticket reservation.
- Confirmed hotel booking or Letter of invitation of the Austrian host
- Medical Travel Insurance
- Minimum coverage of Euro 30,000
- Inclusive of repatriation flight
- For Minors:
- Signature of both the parents is required in the Visa application form.
- Birth certificate with the parents name, parents passport copy and Air ticket.
- If the Minor is travelling unaccompanied affidavit signed by both parents and their passport copy.
- Both parents have to be present at the time of application submission.

- Please click here to download minor form
- All applicants are requested to please print the below documents
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for OMANI 11 2025 
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for NON-OMANI 12 2024
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for Yemeni Citizens 12 2024
- Information Data Protection

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit your Processing Time with the new photo format, as explained below:
General

The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-coloured background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size

The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 x 4.5 (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Grup Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
- Attaching the Photo to the Processing Time
- Glue one photograph to the Processing Time in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the Processing Time of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with.

Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is
                                                                        10 working days (starting from the time when the
                                                                        Embassy or Consulate received the application,
                                                                        not including the transportation time), counting
                                                                        from when all requested documents have been
                                                                        submitted. This period may be extended in
                                                                        specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of
                                                                        the application is required, for example, when
                                                                        an applicant must come to an interview or submit
                                                                        additional documentation requested by the
                                                                        Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of
                                                                        the year, the processing time can be longer due
                                                                        to the high volume of applications. It is
                                                                        recommended to submit your visa application at
                                                                        least two weeks prior to date of travel date and
                                                                        if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday
                                                                        period. 
Please note that the application processing time
                                                                        and decisions on visa applications are the sole
                                                                        prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS
                                                                        Global has no role to play in these areas of the
                                                                        application process.

## Download Forms
Visa Application Form - Arabic
Visa Application Form - English

visa_types.name: Business Visit
visa_types.documents_required:
- Application form duly filled and signed by the applicant.
- Two recent passport size colour photograph (not older than 6 months).
- Passport not older than 10 years
- Passport validity minimum 90 days from the date of expiry of the requested visa
- Two blank opposite visa pages
- Photocopies of:
- Passport
- Applicants OmanVisa
- Previous Schengen, USA, UK, Canada, Japan visas
- Oman Visa valid at least for 90 days from the date of the expiry of the requested Schengen visa
- Local Sponsor’s letter (N.O.C)*(Form A) specifying salary

*If the applicant is a partner of the local company, he has to provide Trade license and sponsor Letter
Documents to be provided from the Austrian Company:
- Invitation letter from an Austrian Company written in Austrian (Form C)
- Copy of the ID card of the person who signed the Invitation letter
- Return air ticket reservation.
- Proof of Accommodation:
- Hotel or other accommodation mentioned in the Invitation letter
 Or  
Copy of confirmed hotel booking
- Medical Travel Insurance
- Minimum coverage of Euro 30,000
- Inclusive of repatriation flight
All applicants are requested to please print the below documents
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for OMANI 11 2025 
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for NON-OMANI 12 2024
- Click here for Checklist Visa C for Yemeni Citizens 12 2024
- Information Data Protection

- The applicable visa fee in Omani Riyals is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of OMR 13.500 per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit your Processing Time with the new photo format, as explained below:
General

The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-coloured background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.

The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 x 4.5 (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Grup Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
- Attaching the Photo to the Processing Time
- Glue one photograph to the Processing Time in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the Processing Time of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10
                                                                working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or
                                                                Consulate received the application, not including the
                                                                transportation time), counting from when all requested
                                                                documents have been submitted. This period may be
                                                                extended in specific cases, notably when further
                                                                scrutiny of the application is required, for example,
                                                                when an applicant must come to an interview or submit
                                                                additional documentation requested by the Embassy or
                                                                Consulate. During certain times of the year, the
                                                                processing time can be longer due to the high volume of
                                                                applications. It is recommended to submit your visa
                                                                application at least two weeks prior to date of travel
                                                                date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday
                                                                period. 
Please note that the application processing time and
                                                                decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative
                                                                of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to
                                                                play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.name: Transit
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Transit]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Omani Riyals is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of OMR 13.500 per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
Documents Required
Requisite documents for transit visa
- Application form duly filled and signed by applicant
- Two recent passport-size color photographs with white background not older than 6 months.
- Passport not older than 10 years.
- Passport having validity of 90 days from date of expiry of visa of the requested visa
- Two blank opposite visa pages.
- Photocopies of:
- Passport
- Applicants Oman Visa
- Previous Schengen, USA, UK, Canada, Japan visas
- Oman visa valid for 90 days from the date of expiry of the requested visa
- Covering letter for the applicant detailing purpose of trip, duration of stay and outlining travel itinerary
- Local sponsor letter (N.O.C)*

*If the applicant is a partner of the local company, he has to provide Trade license and sponsor Letter
Proof of Financial means:
- Pay slips of the last 3 months
- Bank statements of the last 3 months (original or copy stamped by the bank)
- Valid visa / Permit of Stay or equivalent document of destination country if required (Non Schengen)
- Return air ticket reservation.
Medical travel insurance
- minimum coverage of Euro 30,000
- Inclusive of repatriation flight
For Minors:
- Signature of both the parents is required in the Visa application form.
Birth certificate with the parents’ name, parents’ passport copy and Air ticket.
- If the Minor is travelling unaccompanied, Affidavit signed by both parents in addition to the above documents.
- Both parents have to be present at the time of application submission.
Transit Visa for Seaman
For those who are applying for a transit visa to be boarded on vessels in Italian territorial waters, we also require:
- Resignation Letter
- N.O.C. from the port authority in Italy
- Contract with the new employer (Vessel’s company)
- The Seaman book (if applicable)and valid visa from the company’s flag country
- One way ticket
Click here for Transit  Checklist

- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size

The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 x 4.5 (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Grup Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
- Attaching the Photo to the Processing Time
- Glue one photograph to the Processing Time in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the Processing Time of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is
                                                                        10 working days (starting from the time when the
                                                                        Embassy or Consulate received the application,
                                                                        not including the transportation time), counting
                                                                        from when all requested documents have been
                                                                        submitted. This period may be extended in
                                                                        specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of
                                                                        the application is required, for example, when
                                                                        an applicant must come to an interview or submit
                                                                        additional documentation requested by the
                                                                        Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of
                                                                        the year, the processing time can be longer due
                                                                        to the high volume of applications. It is
                                                                        recommended to submit your visa application at
                                                                        least two weeks prior to date of travel date and
                                                                        if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday
                                                                        period. 
Please note that the application processing time
                                                                        and decisions on visa applications are the sole
                                                                        prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS
                                                                        Global has no role to play in these areas of the
                                                                        application process.
